_note: Registrar list (EUDI ARF §Registration, shaped as an ETSI TS 119 602 LoTE). The trust anchor is the Registrar CA (reused from registrar-be); relying-party access certificates chain to it.
title: Registrar
description: Registrar of relying parties. Relying-party access certificates chain to the Registrar CA on this list.
schemeName: Hopae EUDI Sandbox — Registrar (Relying Party Access CAs)
